summary: Story Multiplayer Engine Phase 3 & 4 testing complete. All 26 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI components verified. StoryBattlePage renders leaderboard with #1 highlight, user rank card, and Create Better Version CTA. StoryChainTimeline renders horizontal timeline with expandable branches. NotificationBell handles battle notification types (rank_drop, version_outperformed, story_branched) with icons and deep-links. Routes /app/story-battle/:storyId and /app/story-chain-timeline/:storyId are registered and working.
critical_code_review_comments: story_multiplayer.py: Well-structured with proper ranking formula, notification throttling (6h for rank_drop, 24h for version_outperformed), and creator name enrichment
StoryBattlePage.jsx: All data-testid attributes present (battle-loading, top-contender-card, user-rank-card, battle-leaderboard, create-better-version-btn, contender-card-{rank})

StoryChainTimeline.jsx: All data-testid attributes present (chain-loading, chain-stats, episode-timeline, episode-node-{i}, branches-for-{job_id}, branch-node-{i}, open-battle-btn, view-all-battles-btn)
NotificationBell.js: Properly handles battle notification types with ICON_MAP and COLOR_MAP, deep-link navigation via n.data?.deep_link
test_credentials: Admin: admin@creatorstudio.ai / Cr3@t0rStud!o#2026, Test User: test@visionary-suite.com / Test@2026#
seed_data_creation: Used existing demo chain at root job_id='battle-demo-root' with 3 episodes (root, ep1, ep2) and 3 branches (br1, br2, br3)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Story Multiplayer Engine Phase 3 & 4 fully tested. Key findings: (1) GET /api/stories/battle/{story_id} returns ranked contenders with creator_name, battle_score, rank, and user_rank for authenticated users, (2) GET /api/stories/{story_id}/chain returns episodes sorted by chain_depth and branch_map grouped by parent_job_id, (3) GET /api/stories/feed/trending returns stories sorted by battle_score with creator_name enrichment, (4) GET /api/stories/notifications/battle returns battle-related notifications (rank_drop, version_outperformed, story_branched), (5) POST /api/stories/increment-metric updates battle_score and triggers rank notifications, (6) StoryBattlePage shows #1 contender with crown highlight, user rank card with 'Take it back' CTA if not #1, full leaderboard with 4 contenders, (7) StoryChainTimeline shows 3 episodes in horizontal timeline, 3 branches expandable vertically, 'Open Battle' and 'View All Battles' buttons, (8) NotificationBell shows 'Your story version is falling behind' notification with Zap icon (version_outperformed type), (9) Routes /app/story-battle/:storyId and /app/story-chain-timeline/:storyId both registered and working.

story_battle_page.top_contender_card: PASS - Shows 'The Crystal Maze — Horror Edition' with #1 crown
story_battle_page.user_rank_card: PASS - Shows 'You're #1!' for test user, 'You're ranked #2' for admin

story_chain_timeline.branch_expansion: PASS - Clicking episode expands 3 branch nodes

notification_bell.version_outperformed_notification: PASS - Shows 'Your story version is falling behind' with Zap icon

phase_3_story_chain_visualizer.horizontal_timeline: Episodes displayed in horizontal scrollable timeline
phase_3_story_chain_visualizer.branch_expansion: Clicking episode node expands branches vertically

phase_3_story_battle_screen.user_rank: Shows current user's rank with contextual messaging
phase_3_story_battle_screen.create_better_version_cta: Prominent CTA to create competing branch

phase_4_notification_engine.story_branched: Notification when someone forks user's story
